summary: Tested AI Marketing & Growth Department Phase 1 — backend (16/16 pytest passed) + frontend smoke (all 8 tabs render, AI calls work, occupancy correctly capped at 100%).

issues: County label shows '—' because requests in DB don't have 'county' field populated. Not a code bug but consider showing 'Date indisponibile' instead of '—'.

critical_code_review_comments: marketing_growth.py is 697 lines — close to but under 700 threshold; consider splitting BI/Copilot/Forecast into sub-modules if more endpoints are added in Faza 2.
Dashboard endpoint runs ~12 aggregation pipelines sequentially (await one after another). For larger datasets, consider asyncio.gather() to parallelize independent aggregates.
Insight body limit is 250c in code but system prompt asks for 200c — minor inconsistency, no functional impact.
Copilot endpoint embeds full _build_ai_context() inside the system message on every call — this re-fetches DB aggregates every message in a session. Consider caching per-session for follow-ups.
seed_data_creation: None. Existing seeded data used (777 users, 490 clients, 263 specialists, 108 requests).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 endpoints under /api/admin/marketing/* working. RBAC enforced (client gets 403, anonymous 403). All AI endpoints (insights, recommendations, copilot) call Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations successfully — each takes 8-15s. Frontend route /admin/marketing renders with all 8 tabs functional. Sidebar 'Marketing & Growth' section visible at AdminLayoutMetronic.jsx L218-229 for super_admin. Occupancy rate capping fix at line 132 of marketing_growth.py (min(..., 100.0)) works correctly — observed 100% in UI.
verified_features: GET /api/admin/marketing/dashboard — all 5 top-level keys + nested KPIs present, occupancy <=100%
POST /api/admin/marketing/insights — Claude returned 8 insights, body<=250c, severity/category valid, persisted
GET /api/admin/marketing/insights/recent — returns persisted insights without mongo _id
POST /api/admin/marketing/recommendations — returns marketing[] + business[] arrays with required fields
POST /api/admin/marketing/copilot — generates session_id, follow-up preserves session, replies via Claude
GET /api/admin/marketing/forecast — returns 30-day forecast array + summary (had >=7 days of confirmed orders)
GET /api/admin/marketing/future-ideas — 3 phases (Faza 2/3/4), 12 items total with priority P1/P2/P3
RBAC: client@propmanage.io gets 403 on dashboard/insights/copilot/segments; anonymous gets 403
Frontend: marketing-department-page renders with 8 tabs, all tab switching works, KPI cards populate, AI generate buttons trigger Claude, Copilot chat works with suggestion chips
Sidebar 'Marketing & Growth' section exists with 4 sub-links pointing to /admin/marketing with ?tab= query params
